# jans_shibboleth_configuration (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `entity_id` (String) The entity ID of the Shibboleth Identity Provider
- `scope` (String) The scope used for attribute release

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the Shibboleth IDP is enabled
- `metadata_providers` (List of String) List of metadata provider URLs

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `revision` (Number) Configuration revision number
